title: Corellian classic-revival
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:OrdMantell-SWI36.jpg|thumb|right|300px|[[Worlport/Legends|Worlport]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]].]]

'''Corellian classic-revival''' was a form of architecture presumably originating on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. It centered on spires, monoliths, vast rotundas, rounded arches, and large colonnades. [[Worlport/Legends|Worlport]] was built on Corellian classic-revival.

==Appearances==
*"[[The Bounty Hunter of Ord Mantell]]" {{Reprint|The Bounty Hunter of Ord Mantell}} {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
